violations.description: Both E2E ATDD scenarios are currently skipped, leaving operator/UI acceptance behavior unexecuted in active suites.
violations.suggestion: Unskip once UI contracts are available and include these in PR smoke gates.

violations.description: Positive-path replay and retention behavior is well covered, but explicit invalid signature/auth rejection scenarios are not present in this reviewed set.
violations.suggestion: Add negative tests for bad signature headers and unauthorized admin retention endpoints.

violations.description: Retention cleanup tests validate success and dry-run behavior but do not assert explicit failure/error response paths.
violations.suggestion: Add failure-path assertions for invalid policy windows and backend cleanup faults.

untested_user_paths: Active execution of E2E operator timeline and retention-controls UI acceptance flows

recommendations: Promote E2E ATDD cases from skipped to active once UI contracts are ready
summary: API acceptance coverage is strong for AC1-AC4, but skipped E2E ATDD coverage and missing negative-path cases reduce completeness.
